zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Haydock於1373年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾布拉德利時，他的父親John Haydock51歲，母親Lady Joanna Dutton38歲。他於從1391年到1395年與Isabel de Houghton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾克斯頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Haydock于1373年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾布拉德利时，他的父亲John Haydock51岁，母亲Lady Joanna Dutton38岁。他于从1391年到1395年与Isabel de Houghton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年在英国英格兰藍卡爾艾克斯頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Haydock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Czech or Polish Hejduk , Polish, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland), or Czech Hajduk , and of their Hungarian cognate Hajdók. Compare Hydock .

variants.name: Haddock
meanings: variant of the Lancashire surname Haydock , a habitational name from a place so called near Liverpool, which is probably named from Welsh heiddog ‘characterized by barley’.
from the Middle English personal name Addoc, a pet form of Old English Æddi (itself perhaps derived from one of the names in ēad ‘wealth, prosperity’), with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Haydock was born in 1373, in Bradley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Haydock, was 51 and his mother, Lady Joanna Dutton, was 38. He married Isabel de Houghton from 1391 to 1395, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1425, in Eccleston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Haydock est né en 1373, à Bradley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Haydock, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanna Dutton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Houghton du 1391 au 1395, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1425, à Eccleston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Haydock 1373 in Bradley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Haydock 51 und seine Mutter Lady Joanna Dutton 38. Er hat von 1391 bis 1395 in Lancashire, England Isabel de Houghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1425 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Eccleston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Haydock è nato il nel 1373 nel Bradley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Haydock, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joanna Dutton, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Houghton da 1391 a 1395, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1425, nel Eccleston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Haydockが1373年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアブラドリーで生まれた時，父John Haydockは51歳，母Lady Joanna Duttonは38歳であった。から1391年まで1395年にイギリスランカシュアイアでIsabel de Houghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアエククレストンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Haydock(이)가 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 브래들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Haydock(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joanna Dutton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1391년 부터 1395년 까지 영국 랭카실르에서 Isabel de Houghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 치레스턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Haydock nasceu em 1373, em Bradley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Haydock, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanna Dutton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Houghton de 1391 a 1395, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1425, em Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Haydock родился в 1373 г. в местности брадли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Haydock было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna Dutton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Houghton с 1391 по 1395 в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1425 г. в местности экклестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Haydock nació en 1373, en Bradley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Haydock, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lady Joanna Dutton, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Isabel de Houghton desde 1391 hasta 1395, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1425, en Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
